data.title: International Conference on Sports Marketing, Sponsorship, and Brand Management (ICSMSBM)
data.description: The International Conference on Sports Marketing, Sponsorship, and Brand Management (ICSMSBM), organized by National conference, to be held on 08-March-2026 in Visakhapatnam, India.

data.title: Anthropic Report Says It’s Too Early for AI to Affect Jobs
data.description: The vendor found that highly exposed workers are seeing minimal effect, even as fewer younger workers are being hired.
